name: King Ranch Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil chicken, onion, celery, and salt until the chicken is tender.
2. Remove the chicken from the broth and cool it down. Once cooled, remove the bones and chop the chicken.
3. Reduce the broth to about 1-1/2 cups and add the soups. Mix well.
4. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Arrange the tortilla pieces in the bottom of a buttered 8 x 12 inch casserole dish.
6. Cover the tortilla pieces with chicken chunks.
7. Sprinkle green peppers over the chicken.
8. Cover with Rotel tomatoes.
9. Pour the soup mixture over everything.
10. Cover with foil and bake for 35 to 40 minutes.
11. Remove from the oven and remove the foil.
12. Sprinkle with cheese, return to the oven, and cook until the cheese is bubbly.
13. Serve hot.
